pitch.title: Redefining the
pitch.quote: Architecture is not just a question of space, it's a question of time, culture, and identity.
pitch.desc: At New African Architecture Vision (NAAV), we merge modernity and heritage. Our projects are not simple buildings, but ecosystems designed to last and inspire. We transform constraints into unique architectural opportunities.

services.title: A
services.headerDesc: We offer a complete range of services to transform your vision into a built reality.

items.name: Architectural Design
items.desc: From luxury residences to commercial complexes, we create iconic spaces.

items.name: Interior Design
items.desc: Harmonious interior design combining modern aesthetics with absolute comfort.

items.name: 3D Visualization
items.desc: Photorealistic renderings and virtual tours to bring your projects to life.

items.name: Consultancy & Strategy
items.desc: Comprehensive support in urban development and project viability.

about.heroLead: Founded with the ambition to redefine the continent's urban landscape, NAAV merges Africa's rich cultural heritage with 21st-century cutting-edge technologies.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.text: For us, architecture goes beyond simple construction. It is a dialogue between the past, present, and future. We believe in architecture that breathes, respects its environment, and inspires future generations.

v1.title: Excellence
v1.desc: A standard of quality without compromise in every detail.

v2.title: Innovation
v2.desc: The use of VR and BIM for absolute precision.

v3.title: Heritage
v3.desc: Recovering ancestral codes to magnify them tomorrow.

mission.text: Architecture is the silent witness of our culture and the most powerful tool to shape our future.
mission.author: NAAV Creative Direction

footer.philosophy: Redefining African architecture through innovation and excellence.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.s1Text: The NAAV - New African Architecture Vision website is published by:
legal.s3Text: The entirety of this site falls under international legislation on copyright and intellectual property. All reproduction rights are reserved, including for downloadable documents and iconographic and photographic representations.
legal.s4Text: In accordance with data protection regulations (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, and delete data concerning you. You can exercise this right by contacting us via the site's contact form.

contact.heroLead: Whether you're at the beginning of your journey or ready to break ground, our team is here to guide you in creating your unique architectural project.

info.address: Avenue Cheikh Anta Diop, Dakar, Senegal

servicesPage.heroLead: NAAV offers comprehensive support, from initial design to final delivery, ensuring absolute aesthetic and technical coherence.

items.title: Architectural Design
items.desc: From sketch to execution, we design structures that redefine contemporary African aesthetics.

items.title: Interior Design
items.desc: We create harmonious interior spaces, blending modern luxury with refined local craftsmanship.

items.title: 3D Visualization & VR
items.desc: Total immersion in your future projects through photorealistic renderings and virtual tours.

items.title: Urbanism & Consulting
items.desc: Development of sustainable urban strategies and planning of smart neighborhoods.

steps.title: Diagnostic & Vision
steps.desc: Site analysis, understanding your needs and defining the initial architectural concept.

steps.title: Sketches & Modeling
steps.desc: Development of early forms and 3D visualization to validate the artistic direction.

steps.title: Technical Development
steps.desc: Detailed plans, choice of materials and integration of sustainable solutions.

steps.title: Monitoring & Execution
steps.desc: Rigorous support throughout the construction phase to guarantee excellence.
